title: Piglin Conservatory v3.0
description: Adds a news structure to the Nether, The Piglin Conservatory, along with a new Obsidian Apple, Dragon Fruit, Toxic Mushrooms, Hoglins' Fossils, Corrupted Emerald and a New Music Discs!
body:
# Piglin Conservatory v3.0 **The DataPack** adds **Piglin Conservatory**, a structure to the Nether along with a new **Obsidian Apple**, **Dragon Fruit**, **Toxic Mushrooms**, **Hoglins' Fossils**, **Corrupted Emerald** and a **New Music Discs!** 🔥 ![Piglin Conservatory Logo 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b71dbf8bb2ae2e0a39199fcfabd347d90b4d47c_0.webp) > **LuisterCorp © - 2025** ## Notas📝 (Notes) - **Piglin Conservatory** is **translated into both English - Spanish - Deutsch and more📇** - **Piglin Conservatory** is **compatible** with versions **1.21 to 1.21.11**🏷️ - **Piglin Conservatory** adds new Nether and Overworld **(structures)** to world generation🌐 - **Piglin Conservatory** is compatible with any **generation Datapack in the World** - **Use Headphone** for a **better experience** 🎧 ## Descripción 🎼 (Description) Have fun in a totally new experience in the vanilla Nether, **we added a new dragon fruit along with its golden version, along with different secrets inside it plus 3 structures** one in the Nether and one in the **Overworld**, thus bringing a **unique and entertaining feature to Minecraft**🌎 ![Promotional Conservatory Updated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f58235b0ad626daf1fce58cf2e2721cdfcbb21f.jpeg) With this **Datapack**, exploration becomes more exciting, and below we will show **every detail** ## New's Structures 🗺️ (Nuevas Estructuras)
Piglin Conservatory **Piglin Conservatory** can be generated at heights near the lava from +32 to +48 blocks high every 500 blocks from each other. **The Piglin Conservatory**, is generated in all **Nether biomes (except Basalt Deltas)**, if you want to locate it by **commands use:** `` /locate structure luistercorp:piglin_conservatory `` ![Gold Nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0175fdac369f99056466dcb07ac9b8a415042474.png) **Promotional Image:** ![Piglin Conservatory ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bfd604b12ff26dbcedf261400274ffadb345d96.png) ![Red Bundle Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78d531297579e4fc69f640a0ee20f322999ba971.png) **Biome Generation List:** > [ "minecraft:soul_sand_valley", "minecraft:crimson_forest", "minecraft:warped_forest", "minecraft:nether_wastes" ],
Traveling Wagon The **Traveling Wagon** can be spawned in the Overworld alongside a **Custom Fruit Vendor Villager** with unique sales you won't want to miss, the structure also features its own loot table and a variety of fruits and vegetables from all over Minecraft. **The Traveling Wagon**, is generated in all **biomes with hardwood forests**, if you want to locate it by **commands use:** `` /locate structure luistercorp:traveling_wagon `` ![Apple item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cd7e053755c4ec2eaeafa93199fd0c2ca64f7b4.png) **Promotional Image:** ![Traveling wagon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc4b09c72014389cb2e861e133dbe515a591d124.png) ![Obsidian Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1231e14d872c182a59170e2556d6abb4c9e27b22.png) **Merchandise for Sale:** ![Tradeos Conservatorio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b10cd82b4e4f92c6788a28b2f82af1236eb26641.png) ![Purple Bundle Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cdaa72d9756aa4fa19e377be580b9521b36e155.png) **Biome Generation List:** > [ "minecraft:snowy_taiga", ],
Nether Portal Ruins The **Nether Portal Ruins** can be generated in the **Overworld** along with their own Loot Table and a variety of **New Items** added in this Datapack from **Hoglin Fossils, Obsidian Apples and a new Music Disc** The **Nether Portal Ruins** are spawned in all plains biomes within 2'500 to 3'750 blocks of each other, if you want to locate them by **commands use:** `` /locate structure luistercorp:portal_ruins `` ![Obsidian Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1231e14d872c182a59170e2556d6abb4c9e27b22.png) **Promotional Image:** ![Nether Portal Ruins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b86379118d978ea9ad8b17876286abba968eddd.jpeg) ![Black bundle item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2a41e4f8ffd4fdeb0c91f17e326fece16484894.png) **Biome Generation List:** > [ "minecraft:plains", "minecraft:forest", ],
Cherry Nether Portal The **Cherry Nether Portal** can be generated in the **Cherry Grove** along with their own **Loot Table and a new Music Disc** The **Nether Portal Ruins** are spawned in all plains biomes within 5'000 to 7'500 blocks of each other, if you want to locate them by **commands use:** `` /locate structure luistercorp:cherry_nether_portal `` ![Obsidian Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1231e14d872c182a59170e2556d6abb4c9e27b22.png) **Promotional Image:** ![Cherry Nether Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baa1c22e7063aaa3dc14097a73d2577052e2c674.jpeg) ![Black bundle item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2a41e4f8ffd4fdeb0c91f17e326fece16484894.png) **Biome Generation List:** > [ "minecraft:cherry_grove", ],
> More Soon... ## New's Items ✨ (Nuevos Items)
Corrupted Emerald To get the **Corrupted Emerald**, you will have to climb to the top of the **Piglin Conservatory** in the Nether to get its unique effect. ![Gold Nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0175fdac369f99056466dcb07ac9b8a415042474.png) **Promotional Image:** ![Corrupted Emerald Promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f8513d4f64df6f0d689b92bcb6db6105daf3786.jpeg) ![Potion Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90bb47a55cd5b72ab993f825568838e71314c0e4.png) **Effects to be Used:** - **As long as you have the item in your hand (main or secondary), you will have the Hero of the Village effect** - **When you change the item or release it, the effect is automatically removed**
Dragon Fruit To get **Dragon Fruit**, you will have to **trade with the Piglins** in the Nether or **find it in Traveling Wagons** and/or the **Piglin Conservatory.** ![Gold Nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0175fdac369f99056466dcb07ac9b8a415042474.png) **Promotional Image:** ![Dragon Fruit Promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e621ecbaaf5375d0a2819a99a836ddc33a64977.png) ![Potion Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90bb47a55cd5b72ab993f825568838e71314c0e4.png) **Effects to be consumed:** > minecraft:regeneration (00:03 duration) minecraft:fire_resistance (01:10 duration)
Golden Dragon Fruit To get **Golden Dragon Fruit**, you will have to find the treasure rooms inside the **Piglin Conservatory** ![Gold Nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0175fdac369f99056466dcb07ac9b8a415042474.png) **Promotional Image:** ![Golden Dragon Fruit Promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55880f580b5cacab9f668026db33d7776046953f.png) ![Potion Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90bb47a55cd5b72ab993f825568838e71314c0e4.png) **Effects to be consumed:** > minecraft:regeneration (00:05 duration) minecraft:absorption (02:00 duration) minecraft:fire_resistance (02:30 duration)
Obsidian Apple To get the **Obsidian Apple**, you can find them in the chests of the **Nether Portal Ruins** or by buying them from the fruit merchant villager in the **Traveling Wagon**. ![Gold Nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0175fdac369f99056466dcb07ac9b8a415042474.png) **Promotional Image:** ![Obsidian Apple Promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40cee4a5609a62307f452721af9066bdd2b42949.jpeg) ![Potion Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90bb47a55cd5b72ab993f825568838e71314c0e4.png) **Effects to be consumed:** > minecraft:regeneration (00:10 duration) minecraft:fire_resistance (01:40 duration) minecraft:absorption (02:00 duration) minecraft:resistance (01:40 duration) clear @p wither effect
Toxic Mushroom To get **Toxic Mushroom**, you will have to battle in the room of bones and harmful experiments inside the **Piglin Conservatory**. ![Gold Nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0175fdac369f99056466dcb07ac9b8a415042474.png) **Promotional Image:** ![Toxic Mushroom Promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/131b3ea60ab8d0e755a3e05c42d5357901dcca77.png) ![Potion Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90bb47a55cd5b72ab993f825568838e71314c0e4.png) **Effects to be consumed:** > minecraft:poison (00:10 duration)
Hoglin Tooth To get **Hoglin's Tooth**, it is one of the most common resources in any room within **Piglin Conservatory**. ![Gold Nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0175fdac369f99056466dcb07ac9b8a415042474.png) **Promotional Image:** ![Hoglin tooth promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a176fc87ed6ceeaaf3a3d7390ee944bf277bdee1.png) ![Potion Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90bb47a55cd5b72ab993f825568838e71314c0e4.png) **Not consumable**
Hoglin Fossil To get the **Hoglin Fossils**, it is one of the most common resources in the chests of the **Nether Portal Ruins**. ![Gold Nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0175fdac369f99056466dcb07ac9b8a415042474.png) **Promotional Image:** ![Hoglin Fossil promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/815c370c0e692699fac4e5ed3beb430edf59c314.jpeg) ![Potion Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90bb47a55cd5b72ab993f825568838e71314c0e4.png) **Not consumable**
> More Soon... ## Music Discs 🥏 (Discos de Música)
Psylla - In Bonfires Green [NCS Release] **🎨Diseño (Design):** ![Psylla - In Bonfires Green](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0120908146422ffe8fb8913e0e3851ff2a56740e.png) **◽Encontrable (Find It)** **💠Música y Artista (Music and Artist):** > [In Bonfires Green](https://ncs.io/IBG) > By: [Psylla](https://www.instagram.com/psyllamusic/) > More: [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/psyllamusic) - [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/artist/0glz26CRdAXpDqL31326C8) - [Bandcamp](https://psylla.bandcamp.com/) - [Twitter](https://x.com/psyllamusic)
Clarx - Zig Zag [NCS Release] **🎨Diseño (Design):** ![Clarx - Zig Zag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27a04490288ebd1c68548f48f492d6039345271e.jpeg) **◽Encontrable (Find It)** **💠Música y Artista (Music and Artist):** > [Zig Zag](https://ncs.io/ZigZag) > By: [Clarx](https://www.instagram.com/clarxmusic/) > More: [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/clarxmusic) - [FaceBook](https://www.facebook.com/clarxmusic) - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@clarxmusic) - [Twitter](https://x.com/clarxmusic)
Ramzoid - Electron [NCS Release] **🎨Diseño (Design):** ![Ramzoid - Electron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bafc5dc3d8b88ab4413e070c62f964531f3f1d22.jpeg) **◽Encontrable (Find It)** **💠Música y Artista (Music and Artist):** > [Electron](https://ncs.io/electron) > By: [Ramzoid](https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/artist/2Ci3Sflo2BfC77wTwn2hbH) > More: [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/ramzoid) - [Twitter](https://x.com/ramzoidmusic) - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/ramzoidmusic) - [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/ramzoid) - [Tumblr](https://ramzoid.tumblr.com/)
> More Soon... ## New Advancements 🏆 (Nuevos Logros) When you get any of the **new items and discs or find any of the new structures** of this Datapack, you will get a new section of **perzonalized advancements** with references to different movies🎬, series📺 and videogames 🕹... **◾Image:** ![Logros Conservatorio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86b1bd1dad10e0c4dd7386ea5a6bf2ed2f443545.png) These **12 Advancements**, are obtained by finding a **Dragon Fruit**, finding the **Traveling Wagon** and getting **Hoglin's Fossils, and the newly added discs 💿**. ## Procesos de Instalación 💾 (Installation Processes) Below we invite you to review the correct installation process of our Data Package in the following categories 💥
Singleplayer - Un Jugador ### Pasos Para Instalar DataPack (Steps to Install DataPack): 1. **Abrir Minecraft (Open Minecraft)** Inicia el juego (start the game). 2. **Crea un Nuevo Mundo (Create a New World)** Vaya a "Más" y haga clic en **"Paquetes de Datos".** (go to “More” and click on **"Datapacks”**). ![Paquete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26e7fd8563f89e5e1187cb75c23ed01e66e74510_0.webp) 3. **Añadir el Datapack (Add Datapack)** Arrastre el Paquete de Datos (un archivo `` .zip `` o directorio) a la ventana de Minecraft. 📟 (Drag the Data Package (a `` .zip `` or directory) to the Minecraft window). ![Instalación](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83eb2a221e0a73e9a47e5a1b6eb0c1c9696dc0e4_0.webp) Aparecerá una pantalla de confirmación. Haga clic en **"Confirmar".** 📟 (A confirmation screen will appear. Click on **"Confirm ”**). ![Disponibles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/debb69d77125f6cd8c4215542ed09a2b7fdba8cc_0.webp) 4. **Activar el DataPack (Activate the DataPack)** Mueva el **Paquete de Datos** al lado derecho de la pantalla haciendo **clic** en el triángulo de su ícono (visible al pasar el cursor sobre él). 📟 Move the **Datapack** to the right side of the screen by **clicking** on its triangle icon (visible when hovering over it). ![Crear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7224c17aa180a2c6d5d1161e2e93d8f0c9a7f2d_0.webp) 5. **Creación del Mundo Nuevo (Creation of the New World)** Haz clic en **"Hecho"** en la parte inferior de la pantalla. 📟 (Click **"Done ”** at the bottom of the screen). ![Nuevo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7a9241822375bbb9b11ed8f51cf5c2fe8a07e6f.png) Continúa creando tu mundo y haz clic en **"Crear nuevo mundo".** 📟 (Continue creating your world and click on **"Create new world ”**). ### ⚠️ IMPORTANTE - IMPORTANT⚠️ Se generará un aviso al momento de crear un **mundo nuevo**, ya que son **características experimentales**, cualquier tipo de error puede ser comunicado a nuestro **[Discord Oficial](https://discord.gg/Zj43yM8eac)** 📟 A warning will be generated when creating a **new world**, since these are **experimental features**, any kind of error can be communicated to our **[Discord Oficial](https://discord.gg/Zj43yM8eac)** ![Disclamer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e769737dddf60ebd9afaf4342021e89fd132357_0.webp) Continue dandole al boton **Sí** y disfrute de su Aventura :) 📟 Continue clicking the **Yes** button and enjoy your adventure :)
Multiplayer - Multijugador ### Pasos Para Instalar DataPack (Steps to Install DataPack): 1. **Abrir la carpeta de tu servidor (Open the folder on your server)** Navega hasta la carpeta de tu servidor y luego abre la **carpeta del mundo** en el que deseas instalar el **Paquete de Datos** (predeterminado: `` world ``). Navigate to your server folder and then open the **world folder** in which you want to install the **Datapacks** (default: `` world ``). 2. **Agrega el DataPack (Add the DataPack)** El **Paquete de Datos** debe ser un archivo `` .zip ``.file. Coloca el **Paquete de Datos** en una carpeta llamada `` datapacks `` dentro de la carpeta **world.** The **DataPack** must be a `` .zip `` file. Place the **DataPack** in a folder named `` datapacks `` inside the **world** folder. 3. **Vuelve a cargar el servidor (reload the server)** Escribe `` /reload `` desde la consola o como operador de nivel 3, si el servidor estaba ejecutándose durante la instalación. Type `` /reload `` from the console or as a level 3 operator, if the server was running during installation. ### ⚠️ IMPORTANTE - IMPORTANT⚠️ Se generará un aviso al momento de crear un **mundo nuevo**, ya que son **características experimentales**, cualquier tipo de error puede ser comunicado a nuestro **[Discord Oficial](https://discord.gg/Zj43yM8eac)** 📟 A warning will be generated when creating a **new world**, since these are **experimental features**, any kind of error can be communicated to our **[Discord Oficial](https://discord.gg/Zj43yM8eac)**
## LuisterCorp Projects: ## Advancements Projects: ## Towerinator Projects: ## Sponsored by [Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/Luister) 💌 ![Luister Code](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Towerinator/MP_Towerinator_promo.webp)
